page: Microsoft Azure EC8es_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECEV5 server family. It is configured with 8 dedicated virtual CPUs managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system features an Intel processor and provides 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This instance does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes. It is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance external disk options. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this configuration, and it does not feature any GPU hardware accelerators.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the EC8es_v5 offers a high density of memory relative to its compute resources, making it a structured option for workloads that require substantial RAM without the overhead of a larger vCPU count. This resource profile is aligned with memory-intensive workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caching layers, and enterprise applications that process large datasets in memory.
description: Microsoft Azure EC8es_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance from the ECEV5 family, powered by an Intel processor and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing the attachment of high-performance external storage volumes. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are provided. This configuration is designed for memory-intensive workloads that require significant RAM relative to compute capacity, such as relational databases, in-memory data stores, and data processing applications. Its resource density provides a qualitative cost-efficiency advantage for memory-bound tasks that do not require local disk storage or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC8es_v5 is a memory-optimized x86_64 server with 8 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 64.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for memory-intensive database workloads.

tagline: An x86_64 memory-optimized virtual server featuring eight dedicated vCPUs, sixty-four gigabytes of RAM, and premium external storage support.

Premium Storage capable with zero local storage
Zero integrated GPUs and zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses
Suited for relational databases and in-memory caching
